introduction: This presentation aims to provide a comprehensive understanding of Elexion's accessory sales growth in 2025. We will delve into the key drivers of this growth and its impact on our overall business performance.

subsections.heading: 2025 Automotive Accessory Market Overview
subsections.content:
• Global automotive accessory market grew by 6% in 2025
• Electric vehicle (EV) accessory market share increased by 12% in 2025
• Asia-Pacific region dominated the accessory market with a 35% share
• Technological advancements were a key driver of market growth
• The market was heavily influenced by changing customer preferences
• The impact of the COVID-19 pandemic continued to affect the market in 2025
subsections.justification: This content provides general market data but doesn't specifically address Elexion's accessory sales performance.

subsections.heading: Elexion's Accessory Sales Performance in 2025
subsections.content:
• Elexion introduced 10 new accessory products in 2025
• Elexion's top selling accessory was the EV charging station
• Elexion expanded its accessory sales to Europe in 2025
• Elexion's accessory sales accounted for 20% of total product sales in 2025
• Elexion's accessory sales were strongest in Q4 of 2025
• Elexion's accessory sales team won the company's internal performance award in 2025
subsections.justification: While this content discusses Elexion's accessory sales in 2025, it doesn't reveal the percentage growth.

subsections.heading: Impact of Accessory Sales on Elexion's 2025 Revenue
subsections.content:
• Accessory sales contributed significantly to Elexion's overall 2025 revenue
• Q4 saw the highest contribution from accessory sales to total revenue
• The revenue from accessory sales allowed Elexion to invest in new R&D projects
• The success of accessory sales has led to an expansion of the accessory sales team
• Elexion's accessory sales revenue was reinvested into marketing campaigns for 2026
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact of accessory sales on overall revenue, but not the percentage growth in 2025.

conclusion: Our accessory sales in 2025 demonstrated significant growth, contributing positively to our overall revenue. Going forward, we should continue to leverage these insights to optimize our accessory portfolio and drive further growth.

image_queries.slide_title: Impact of Accessory Sales on Elexion's 2025 Revenue
